steps.t: Tumladen can be found in northern Upper Lebennin. Faltharan has asked you to meet him in Tumladen in Upper Lebennin.
The gate-warden can be found immediately outside Tumladen in northern Upper Lebennin. You have arrived at Tumladen and have been sighted by one of the…

Faltharan can be found somewhere within Tumladen. You have been granted entry to Tumladen and should now seek out Faltharan.
